items: Call to Order
Roll Call
Welcome
Annual Board Officer's Rotation
President of the Board of Trustees
Vice President of the Board of Trustees
Clerk of the Board of Trustees
Representative to San Mateo County Committee on School District Organization
Liaison to California School Boards Association and the San Mateo County School Boards Association
Secretary to the Board of Trustees (Superintendent)
Changes to the Agenda
Approval of the Agenda (Action Required)
Public Comment
Discussion Items
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy and Administrative Regulation 5125.1: Release of Directory Information
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 6162.51: State Academic Achievement Tests
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy and Administrative Regulation 0430: Comprehensive Local Plan For Special Education
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy and Administrative Regulation 6159: Individualized Education Program
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy and Administrative Regulation 6159.2: Nonpublic, Nonsectarian School and Agency Services for Special Education
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy and Administrative Regulation 6159.3: Appointment of Surrogate Parent for Special Education Students
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 5145.11: Questioning and Apprehension by Law Enforcement
Approval of Consent Items (Action Required)
Approval of the November 21, 2025, Board Meeting Minutes
Approval of the Amended September 18, 2025 Board Meeting Minutes
Acceptance of Donation
Approval of Annual Developer Fee Report - Fiscal Year 2024-25
Authorization to Declare Outdated Kitchen Equipment as Surplus and Approve Disposal
Approval of the Citizens' Bond Oversight Committee Membership
Action Items (Action Required)
Approval of the 2025-26 First Interim Budget Report for RCSD
Board and Superintendent Reports
Information
Information on San Mateo County Investment Fund - November 2025
Correspondence
Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Board of Trustees Meeting Reflection
Board of Trustees Meeting Calendar
Adjournment (Action Required)

llmResponse.agenda_changes: No changes to the agenda were announced. President Weekley stated: 'Do my fellow trustees have any proposed changes to today's agenda? No, seeing none, I would like for somebody to please move to approve the agenda.'
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I'll move to approve our consent items agenda. Second, all those in favor? Passes unanimously.

items.intro_words: I can get started. Evelyn, you want to kick us off with the roll call?
Trustee Lee. Here. Trustee King. Trustee Marcus. Here.
Good evening, and welcome to the December 17, 2025 meeting of the Redwood City School Board.
Moving on. It's our officer's rotation. We do this annually. We rotate left.
All right, so we have the rotation. David Wakely becomes the president.
David Wakely becomes the president. Cecilia Marquez, vice president.
Jennifer King becomes the clerk. And the representative to San Mateo County Committee.
And the representative to San Mateo County Committee on School District Organization, David Lee.
And then the liaison to the California School Boards association and the San Mateo County School Boards Association, Mike Wells.
And then, of course, the secretary of the board is a superintendent.
And with our rotation complete, we are now going to move to Changes to the agenda.
Do my fellow trustees have any proposed changes to today's agenda? No, seeing none, I would like for somebody to please move to approve the agenda.
Now we're going to open to public comment. Do we have any people online?
So that then is going to be the end of public comment period. We're on to our discussion items.
So we have 7.1 the first reading and discussion of board policy and administrative regulation 5125 decimal 1 release of directory information.
7.2 first reading and discussion of board policy 6162 decimal 51 State academic achievement tests.
7.3 First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy and Administrative Regulation 0430 Comprehensive Local Plan for special education.
7.4. First reading and discussion of board policy and administrative regulation 6159 individualized education program.
7.5. First reading and discussion of board policy and administrative regulation. 6159 decimal 2. Non public, non sectarian school and agency services for special education.
Okay, Moving on to 7.6. First reading and discussion of board policy and administrative regulation 6159 decimal 3.
Moving on to 7 decimal 7. First reading and discussion of board policy 5145 decimal 11. Questioning and apprehension by law enforcement.
I'll move to approve our consent items agenda. Second, all those in favor?
I'll move to approve our consent items agenda. Second, all those in favor?
I'll move to approve our consent items agenda. Second, all those in favor?
I'll move to approve our consent items agenda. Second, all those in favor?
I'll move to approve our consent items agenda. Second, all those in favor?
I'll move to approve our consent items agenda. Second, all those in favor?
I'll move to approve our consent items agenda. Second, all those in favor?
We're going to move on to consent items just for members of the public.
All right, we are on to nine decimal one, which is the approval of the 2025, 2026 first interim budget report for RCSD.
So with that, we're now done with 9.1 and we move on to board and superintendent reports.
Who would like to go first? I can start on Monday.
And with that we'd like to move to 11.1 information on San Mateo County Investment Fund, November 2025.
With that we'll move to section 12 correspondence. Have folks received any written correspondence they'd like to share?
Okay, moving on to agenda item 13, other business or suggested items for a future agenda.
All right, so with that we're going to move to section 14 meeting reflection.
And with that 15 board of trustees meeting calendar looks like our future board meetings on the 13th, we have a study session.
Okay. And with that, I think that brings US to item 16, which is adjournment, which has a required action.
